title: Statistical report on the participation of the hard-to-reach populations in the tax and benefit systems - Canada.ca
content:
## Statistical report on the participation of the hard-to-reach populations in the tax and benefit systems
The report presents tax filing and benefit participation rates for six populations deemed hard-to-reach or vulnerable, estimated by linking the 2021 Census and Canada Revenue Agency tax data by sociodemographic characteristics and geographic area.
- 2024 Edition (2020 tax year)
- 2024 Edition (2020 tax year) visualization

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
